import torch
import gc

def run_experiment_a(dataset):
    model = torch.nn.Linear(10, 1)
    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters())
    for epoch in range(100):
        for batch in dataset:
            loss = model(batch)
            loss.backward()
            optimizer.step()
    return model

def run_experiment_b(dataset):
    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
    gc.collect()
    model = torch.nn.Linear(10, 1)
    optimizer = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=0.01)
    for epoch in range(100):
        for batch in dataset:
            loss = model(batch)
            loss.backward()
            optimizer.step()
    return model

def run_all_experiments(datasets):
    results = []
    for dataset in datasets:
        model_a = run_experiment_a(dataset)
        model_b = run_experiment_b(dataset)
        results.append((model_a, model_b))
        torch.cuda.empty_cache()
        gc.collect()
    return results
